name: otter-ai
description: Access Otter.ai meeting transcripts, summaries, action items, and meeting metadata from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Access Otter.ai meeting transcripts, summaries, and action items.
interface.longDescription: Otter.ai connects Codex to your meeting intelligence so you can search past conversations, retrieve transcripts, summarize decisions, and extract action items directly in your workflow.
defaultPrompt: Find my recent Otter.ai meetings about this project and summarize key decisions.
Pull the Otter.ai transcript for my latest customer call and extract action items.
Search Otter.ai for mentions of this account and summarize follow-ups.
